source_refs: Project evidence: homepage About section image role and composition target
business_goal: Strengthen trust by showing a credible, modern technology facility or architectural facade
visual_message: An established, high-tech engineering environment expressed through a clean architectural exterior

reference_roles.image_2: material, facade detail, and realism reference

iteration_hypothesis: A tighter architectural composition with clear facade realism will better support the About section than a generic city or office image

technical_signals.aperture: f/4 to f/5.6 for facade clarity
technical_signals.light_source: controlled daylight with clean reflective glass behavior
technical_signals.time_of_day: late morning or late afternoon neutral daylight
technical_signals.motion_rule: still architectural shot with no people or vehicles as the primary subject

spatial_positioning: vertical structure remains legible even in a cropped web container
secondary facade detail can support texture without stealing focus
visual_standard: architectural exterior photography with corporate brand discipline
color_restriction: restrained glass, steel, concrete, and cool neutral daylight tones; avoid oversaturated skies and neon reflections
reality_anchor: high-tech office tower or engineering facility exterior

composition_rule.hero_safe_area: not required; composition should prioritize facade legibility
composition_rule.focal_structure: one dominant facade mass with one supporting detail rhythm
composition_rule.camera: architectural exterior photography, eye-level or slightly upward

lighting_rule.surface_behavior: clean glass highlights and believable reflections

disallowed_ai_signals: busy traffic or crowds dominating the frame
